title: dianthus seguieri subsp. seguieri
intro: Dianthus seguieri subsp. seguieri, also known as the Seguier's pink, is a perennial plant belonging to the carnation family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, colds, and respiratory infections, due to its expectorant and antitussive properties. In herbal preparations, Dianthus seguieri subsp. seguieri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to alleviate symptoms of various conditions, including bronchitis and sore throats.
